title: BABY BOUTIQUE - 211info
text: HOPE CHURCH BABY BOUTIQUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides diapers, wipes, infant and toddler clothing (size 2T and under), and baby equipment. 2835 Santiam Highway SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 2:30pm-4:30pm, Wednesday 10am-noon Email (541) 967-4673 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (541) 967-4673 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Baby Clothing Diapers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
